content.text: I don't have a recorded episode of Mira's first steps in her memory slice — the milestone entries I can see cover things like stacking blocks and pulling to standing, but nothing that logs an independent first step. Rather than guess, I'd check any notes you jotted down at the time (baby book, a text to a grandparent, or a photo timestamp often works well for this). If you'd like, tell me roughly when it happened and I'll save it so it's here for you going forward.
